name: bt-aux-fix
description: Stops the PCM defaulting to FM radio at startup and routes a connected phone to Bluetooth (A2DP) instead - no FM blast, no manual AUX-to-BT toggle. A single self-locating byte patch to the live PCM3Root, found by a unique signature so it works on every region/model/version (v2.00+). Fail-safe and brick-safe: a runtime /proc patch that reverts on reboot and never touches the read-only flash. Runtime = one-shot; Persistent = re-applies each boot via a /HBpersistence hook (reversible); Revert = fully removes the fix and the boot hook (back to stock). Builds on WillCoder's PCM_31_AUX-BT research.
author: dspl1236

values.label: Runtime - applies now, reverts on reboot
Revert to stock - remove the fix and boot hook
